overall.description: A smooth aerial drone shot in a game engine showcasing the USS Arizona Memorial at Pearl Harbor. The camera circles the modern white memorial structure spanning over the sunken battleship, revealing geometric windows, the flagpole, and the surrounding turquoise waters of the harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor water approaching naval memorial

agents.ego_description: flying drone camera approaching the memorial structure from the harbor water

entered.detail: white modernist memorial structure with flat roof spanning over the water
tall flagpole with American flag at the center of the memorial structure
calm turquoise harbor water surrounding the memorial
distant shoreline with green vegetation and trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of Pearl Harbor, approaching the stark white USS Arizona Memorial building that spans across the water. The American flag stands tall at the center of the structure against a clear blue sky, with the distant shoreline of Ford Island visible in the background.

events.description: camera moves underneath the memorial structure into shadowed area
sun becomes visible through the hexagonal windows creating dramatic backlighting

agents.ego_description: flying drone camera moving alongside and under the memorial structure, tilting up at the flag

entered.detail: row of geometric hexagonal openings along the memorial wall revealing the interior
underside of the memorial platform showing support structures over the water

segments.scene_description: The drone moves closer to the memorial, passing underneath the structure and revealing the distinctive hexagonal window openings. The camera tilts up to show the American flag silhouetted against the bright sun before continuing along the side of the building, with lighting shifting as the camera moves through shadow and light.

scene_state.functional_zone: memorial well and sunken battleship wreckage

events.description: camera circles around to reveal the circular well structure of the sunken battleship
camera banks right to show the visitor center dock extending from the memorial

agents.ego_description: circling around the memorial well and transitioning toward the visitor center dock

entered.detail: circular rusty metal structure of the sunken battleship's gun turret base rising from the water
long covered dock structure connecting the memorial to the shore

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around to reveal the circular well opening where the sunken USS Arizona lies below, showing the rusty walls of the ship's barbette. The camera continues around to show the long visitor center dock extending from the memorial, transitioning from the memorial structure to the approach pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: visitor center dock and harbor approach

events.description: camera moves along the visitor center dock showing the assembly area structure

agents.ego_description: flying along the visitor center dock and showing the surrounding harbor environment with distant shoreline

entered.detail: open expanse of the harbor with gentle ripples extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the length of the visitor center dock, showing the covered walkway and assembly area with orange traffic cones. The camera then turns to reveal the expansive harbor waters and the distant tree-lined shore, with the white memorial structure visible in the background against the blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial trajectory that begins with a wide approach to the USS Arizona Memorial and concludes with a sweeping view of the harbor's visitor infrastructure. It begins by gliding toward the stark white memorial building and its central flagpole against a clear blue sky, with the distant shoreline of Ford Island framing the horizon. As the drone moves closer, it passes underneath the structure through hexagonal window openings, causing the lighting to shift between deep shadow and the bright silhouette of the flag. The camera then circles around to reveal the circular well opening and the rusty walls of the sunken battleship below before transitioning toward the long visitor center dock. Finally, the movement follows the length of the covered walkway and assembly area, turning away from the orange traffic cones to reveal the expansive turquoise waters and tree-lined shore with the memorial receding into the background.
